description_long: This object is a pair of futuristic, heavy-duty rifles mounted side by side, each featuring a robust, angular body with pronounced mechanical details and reinforced panels. The rifles have prominent cylindrical barrels with multiple ringed segments and what appear to be muzzle devices at the tips. Both rifles are equipped with compact optical sights mounted on top rails, and the bodies display various geometric protrusions and indents, suggesting modularity and advanced engineering. The lower section includes a sturdy grip and a trigger guard, with a visible mounting bracket or support structure beneath. The overall design is tactical and industrial, with a matte black finish and subtle red highlights near the muzzles. The rifles exude a sense of power and are likely intended for use in high-intensity urban combat scenarios.
description: A pair of heavy, futuristic black rifles with angular bodies, ringed barrels, and compact optical sights, mounted side by side with red highlights at the muzzles.
description_view_0: Side view showing both rifles' full profiles, including the detailed barrels, optical sights, and mounting structure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin barrels, muzzle devices, and red highlights, emphasizing the rifles' width and symmetry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, revealing the same structural and mechanical details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back ends of the rifles and the optical sights, with the mounting structure visible below.
